description: A file uploaded to the vcita assets service for a business.

name.description: Original file name as provided on upload (e.g., "invoice_march.pdf").

url.description: Pre-signed S3 URL to download the file. Valid for 10 minutes. Not present for pending or infected files (e.g., "https://s3.amazonaws.com/...").

thumbnail_url.description: Pre-signed URL for the 400px thumbnail. Only present for supported image types (e.g., "https://s3.amazonaws.com/...").

thumbnail_small_url.description: Pre-signed URL for the 150px thumbnail. Only present for supported image types (e.g., "https://s3.amazonaws.com/...").

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the file at upload time (e.g., {"source": "portal", "ref": "inv-001"}).

deduplicated.description: True when an identical file already existed for this business and the existing record was returned instead of creating a new one (e.g., true, false).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file record was created (e.g., "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z").

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the file record was last updated (e.g., "2026-01-15T10:35:00Z").
